title: Spartan Shields TFC
body:
## addon that allows you to use Spartan Shields in TerrafirmaCraft
mod works only in combination with original sparta shields [=LINK=](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-shields)   and TFC
all recipes have been changed and adapted to the materials existing in TFC
However, it should be noted that if critical raw materials are missing, the recipe for a given item is invisible
example - if you do not have platinum in your resources, the Platinum Shield will not be available for crafting

![Spartan Shields TFC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AbiyCIl3/images/4fe97c903b651f0c6d6f4da3e56759b096c247fd.png)
